markdown:
#  View the All Sketches Report 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click **Reports** and select **Sketches**.


#### Download Sketches
  * Click the **download** ![Icon Download](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d236ba1fb557b15310f33c2028cdfbdb/c6a47c1a2c3e9dc46a0dc2bed2f3c337/icon-download.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to download individual sketches.
  * Download multiple sketches by marking the checkbox next to each sketch and then clicking **Download**.


#### Search and Filter for Sketches
  * Use the search box on the right to search for sketch by title or number.
  * Use the filter boxes on the right to filter for sketches by discipline and set name.


#### Export Sketch Report to a PDF or CSV
  * Click **Export** to export the sketch report to a PDF or CSV format.  
_Note:_ The PDF or CSV will export only those sketches that are currently in the list. This means that it considers search and filter parameters.


## See Also
  * [What are the blue icons in my drawings log?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-blue-icons-in-my-drawings-log)
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [View Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/view-drawings)
title: View the All Sketches Report
description: How to view a report of all of the sketches in the Project level Drawings tool.
